sentiment.reasoning: A $9.6B share buyback program provides immediate support to the stock price and signals management confidence in capital allocation.

sentiment.reasoning: An open letter from the COO addressing investor concerns indicates internal efforts to stabilize sentiment but lacks specific financial impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
